name: Victor Han // Pet play
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Kinktober day 5

You and Victor had this.. thing going on for quite some time. It was all good, you got money and he got your sweet body.

Though, lately Victor had definitely been acting a little different. More possessive, especially now after he got you some collar specifically made for you.

_____________________________

The relationship you two have is basically a sugar daddy/sugar baby relationship. He gives you anything you want and he wants sexual favors in return yada yada 🫥 I think we all know how this works by now

Dude I recently got liquid latex just to test it out for funsies, but MAN each time I pulled it off my skin it pulled every little hair on there off as well 😭 it was not worth the pain so far

Anyway I hope you guys like this one. I made this a few weeks ago and now that I read it back, I’m genuinely curious what I was on. In a good way surprisingly 🤨

[art credits: @old_xian on Twitter]
creator: Brickyard
